name: AI Upscaler Plugin
overview: AI-Powered Video Upscaling Plugin with Docker Microservice Architecture
description: Revolutionary AI upscaling plugin with Docker-based AI processing. Supports NVIDIA CUDA/TensorRT, Intel OpenVINO, AMD ROCm, and CPU. Features automated hardware benchmarking, intelligent fallback system, pre-processing cache, sidebar integration, camera-style video filters with live preview, and AI face restoration (GFPGAN / CodeFormer).
changelog: v1.6.1.11: Bugfix — (1) Regex widened to ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+(?:\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+)*$ so model IDs with dots (rife-v4.6, gfpgan-v1.4, rife-v4.6-lite) no longer return 400; path-traversal patterns (.., leading/trailing dots) still blocked. (2) Docker manifest: 9 broken/pending model entries (nomos8k-hat-x4, apisr-x3, edvr-m-x4, realbasicvsr-x4, animesr-v2-x4, rife-v4.6, rife-v4.6-lite, gfpgan-v1.4, codeformer) flipped to available:False so the UI filters them out instead of fast-failing on load. (3) Fixed 3 more raw fetch() calls in player-integration.js that were silently 401-ing against Upscaler/models/load, Upscaler/upscale-frame and Upscaler/benchmark-frame — same root-cause as v1.6.1.10 (ApiClient.getRequestHeader does not exist; switched to ApiClient.accessToken() bearer header). (4) GET /Upscaler/jobs now requires RequiresElevation — previously leaked active-job file paths to any authenticated user. (5) Jellyfin.Controller SDK pin bumped 10.11.6 → 10.11.8 to match targetAbi (closes patch-level API surface mismatch). (6) Docker service VERSION string + Dockerfile LABELs synced to 1.6.1.11. Bulk-load test: 30 of 30 available models load successfully. | v1.6.1.10: Hotfix — quick-menu model states (download/loaded flags) now load correctly. Raw fetch() to /Upscaler/models was returning 401 because ApiClient.getRequestHeader() doesn't exist in current apiclient builds, so no auth header was attached. Switched _fetchModelStates to ApiClient.ajax which injects X-Emby-Token automatically. Menu summary now shows accurate N of 42 models ready counter. | v1.6.1.9: Redesigned player quick-menu — glassmorphic 380px layout, custom on/off switch, filter chips (All/Downloaded/Recommended), live summary strip (X of Y models ready), per-model download-state icons (ready/download/busy/error) with spinner shown in-place during load. Menu stays open during model loads so users can see progress. Smarter failure messaging: surfaces config-specific hints when AI service auth fails. NEW: AiServiceApiToken plugin config + X-Api-Token auth handler auto-injects the shared secret on every AI service call (fixes 403 API_TOKEN errors on /models/download and /models/load). | v1.6.1.8: Quick-menu model picker now actually loads the model — calls POST /Upscaler/models/load to make the AI service map the weights into memory (previously only persisted the config without warming the service). Error toasts now show the real HTTP/service error instead of a generic failure message. Menu dismisses immediately so the load-progress toast is visible. | v1.6.1.7: AI Face Restoration — GFPGAN v1.4 + CodeFormer integration with OpenCV Haar face detection, feathered alpha-blend paste-back, configurable max-faces & resolution guard. 8 new camera-style filter presets (Sepia, Pastel, Cyberpunk, Drama, Soft Glow, Sharp HD, Retro Game, Teal & Orange). Live Filter Preview now auto-updates on preset dropdown change (300ms debounce, supersedes in-flight requests). Diagnostic docs for the 9 multi-frame / interpolation / Vulkan models that fail single-frame bench. Docker service version synced to 1.6.1.7 with /face-restore/* endpoints. | v1.6.1.6: Live Filter Preview on Filters tab — pick a video, apply any preset to a real frame, compare before/after. New endpoint GET /Upscaler/filter-preview/frame/{itemId}?preset=X. | v1.6.1.5: Fix SMB/network share support in Comparison View — use Jellyfin IMediaEncoder for path resolution. | v1.6.1.4: Comparison View now extracts real video frames via FFmpeg instead of poster images. | v1.6.1.3: Fix controller route — remove api/ prefix so frontend API calls reach the controller. | v1.6.1.2: Fix remaining red Error states on Test Connection/Upscale/SSH buttons. | v1.6.1.1: Fix misleading Error/Unavailable states — show Standalone mode when AI service not configured. Neutral gray styling. Add local filter benchmark. Version display fix. Save button on Filters tab. | v1.6.1.0: Camera-style video filters (7 presets + custom mode). Filter-preview API endpoint.
